ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "home_state" TEXT /* Home state of the participant */,
  "pner_id" INTEGER /* PNER ID of the participant */,
  "eligible" TEXT /* Eligibility status for awards and rankings */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the participant's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who owns the horse */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the horse */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the horse was registered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the horse's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Show Jumping, Dressage) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations of the event */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Scoring system used in the event */,
  "registration_fee" TEXT /* Registration fee for the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the event information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the location information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event participation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points scored by the participant in the event */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Final placing of the participant in the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered for the event */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the event participation information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, participant, spectator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view results) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
